frontmatter.name: generalupdate-init
frontmatter.description: Integrate GeneralUpdate auto-update into any .NET application. Generates Bootstrap configuration code, manifest files, and dual-project (Client+Upgrade) scaffolding. Covers 4 update scenes, Configinfo configuration, appsettings.json, HTTP auth (HMAC/Basic/Bearer), and complete deployment checklist.
